description: Browse Wolt food delivery from the terminal: cities, nearby venues, menus, prices, ETAs, and cross-venue comparisons.

novel_features.name: Menu browsing with prices
novel_features.description: Full venue menu: categories + items + prices + dietary preferences + availability. Discovered via the SSR-embedded React Query state behind the Wolt SPA.

novel_features.name: Menu item search with price cap
novel_features.description: Substring search within a venue's menu (name + description), sorted cheapest first, with --max-price filter in cents.

novel_features.name: What's open right now and fast
novel_features.description: Filter nearby venues by open status + ETA cap + cuisine tag in one structured call. Replaces three SPA card-clicks.

novel_features.name: Cross-venue comparison
novel_features.description: Fan-out per-venue dynamic snapshots and join open status + next-close + delivery configs side by side.

novel_features.name: Cuisine bottleneck
novel_features.description: Which cuisines have the longest average ETA right now near a coordinate — aggregates across nearby venues.

novel_features.name: Order tracking by share link
novel_features.description: Parse a Wolt order share URL and extract the order id. Stub — live JSON tracking endpoint not yet reverse-engineered.
